label: dissertation_v2_dcc3260m_uncalibrated
description: Dissertation Version 2 defaults using the existing Thorlabs DCC3260M camera. Atomic and optical inputs retain the notebook-derived Version 1 model; catalogue camera bounds remain subject to in-apparatus calibration.

imaging_geometry.imaging_axis_note: axis 0 is the across-cigar x direction; the plotted transverse plane is y,z.
imaging_geometry.magnification_status: provisional screening value selected to sample the NA=0.080 Rayleigh resolution with approximately two camera pixels; not measured on the installed apparatus
imaging_geometry.camera_pixel_role: physical sensor pitch; code divides by magnification exactly once

camera_recovery.binning_note: 15 simulation cells represent 1.46484375 um in the object plane, 0.011% below the nominal 1.465 um DCC3260M object-plane pitch at the provisional M=4 screening magnification.
camera_recovery.quantum_efficiency_note: experimentally plausible dissertation screening value; not a DCC3260M measurement and to be replaced during commissioning
camera_recovery.read_noise_note: experimentally plausible dissertation screening value; not a DCC3260M measurement
camera_recovery.read_noise_treatment: use 3 e- rms as the single reference detector value in the dissertation screening figures
camera_recovery.dual_port_sampling: both Wollaston outputs are represented as simultaneous regions of interest on one sensor; the installed geometry remains to be measured

multishot_recovery.recoil_energy_convention: complete absorption-spontaneous-emission cycle deposits 2 E_rec per primary or reabsorbed scattering event

noisy_multishot_filmstrip_recovery.profile_convention: fresh-cloud image formation with the evolving frame state supplied by the full multishot model

status_note: Dissertation screening configuration using the provisional M=4 sampling, QE=0.60 and read noise=3 e- rms. These are not installed-apparatus measurements; NA remains fixed at the reference value 0.080 and kappa_F remains uncalibrated.
